title: Data File
description: A computer file that contains any type of data, including a word processing document or spreadsheet.

definitions.definition: A computer file that contains any type of data, including a word processing document or spreadsheet. It may also refer to a database file that contains records, such as orders and customers. A data file might also refer to the source code of a program but generally not to its executable machine language.
definitions.sources:
- pcmag.com
- NESDIS Data Management Lexicon and Related Terms
